content.stem: Here's a fun puzzle! All Zooks can dance and Flippers are a type of Zook. What must be true about Flippers?
content.explanation: Following the logic given: if ALL Zooks can dance and Flippers ARE Zooks, then Flippers must be able to dance according to these premises.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students incorrectly assume the opposite of the logical conclusion
Students use actual knowledge about flippers/penguins instead of following logical structure
Students apply real-world knowledge about penguins living in Antarctica rather than using given premises
